## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click / call '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Logs

```
# Paste relevant output from data/backend.log or data/frontend.log
# Redact any tokens, API keys, or credentials before pasting
```

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12.3]
- Node version: [e.g. 22.x]
- Provider: [Claude CLI / Anthropic API]
- Component: [Backend / Frontend / MCP server / GitHub OAuth]
